ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., admin, employee) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "password_reset_token" TEXT /* Token for password reset requests */,
  "password_reset_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration time for the password reset token */,
  "multi_factor_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates whether multi-factor authentication is enabled for the user */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time the user last changed their password */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of consecutive failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration time for account lockout due to failed login attempts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_type FOREIGN KEY ("user_type") REFERENCES user_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES user_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the user type (e.g., admin, employee) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user type */,
  "default_role_id" INTEGER /* Default role assigned to users of this type */,
  "can_manage_users" INTEGER /* Indicates whether users of this type can manage other users */,
  "can_manage_roles" INTEGER /* Indicates whether users of this type can manage roles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the user status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user status */,
  "is_system_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this status is a default system status */,
  "lockout_duration" INTEGER /* Duration in minutes for which the account is locked out if this status is set to 'inactive' */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user profile */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user in the organization */,
  "avatar_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* User's birth date */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the employee (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_profiles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user account */,
  "session_token" TEXT /* Unique token for the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the last activity in the session */,
  "expired_at" TEXT /* Date and time the session expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the session (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used for the session */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation data for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_system_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this role is a default system role */,
  "can_manage_users" INTEGER /* Indicates whether users with this role can manage other users */,
  "can_manage_roles" INTEGER /* Indicates whether users with this role can manage roles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_system_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether this permission is a default system permission */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the permission (e.g., user management, role management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission mapping */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the role-permission mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role-permission mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the role-permission mapping */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role-permission mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES user_permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_mapping" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who assigned the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was assigned */,
  "expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date for the role assignment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the user-role mapping */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user-role mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_mapping_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, logout, update) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "logged_at" TEXT /* Date and time the action was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session during which the activity occurred */,
  "affected_user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user affected by the action (if different from the acting user) */,
  "affected_resource" TEXT /* Identifier of the resource affected by the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_affected_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("affected_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "password_reset_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each password reset request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Unique token for the password reset request */,
  "requested_at" TEXT /* Date and time the request was made */,
  "expired_at" TEXT /* Date and time the request expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, expired, completed) */,
  "reset_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reset the password */,
  "reset_at" TEXT /* Date and time the password was reset */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the password reset request was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_password_reset_requests_reset_by FOREIGN KEY ("reset_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
